_note: Each task represents one generative media unit. Fields: id, label, prompt, assetPath, status.

tasks.label: Harbor fog at dawn
tasks.prompt: [0s-3s] Wide establishing shot, harbor, dense morning fog, diffuse golden light filtering through. [3s-6s] Camera drifts forward slowly, mist parts to reveal a solitary fishing vessel at anchor. [6s-10s] Hold on vessel, water ripples, seabirds at distance.

tasks.label: Brutalist structure timelapse
tasks.prompt: [0s-4s] Overhead drone, raw concrete megastructure, overcast sky, no people. [4s-8s] Timelapse, clouds accelerate, shadows trace across the facade. [8s-10s] Ground level, lone figure in distance, scale implied.

tasks.label: Signal propagation visualization
tasks.prompt: [0s-5s] Abstract visualization: radio wave propagation across a dark plane, concentric rings in amber light, no text. [5s-10s] Waves intensify, secondary interference patterns emerge, resolves to single standing wave.

tasks.label: Industrial cooling tower
tasks.prompt: [0s-3s] Extreme wide, industrial cooling towers, steam columns rising into flat grey sky, symmetrical framing. [3s-7s] Slow zoom into steam column, texture becomes visible. [7s-10s] Cut to interior turbine, mechanical rotation, low frequency implied.

tasks.label: Deep ocean pressure study
tasks.prompt: [0s-5s] Black water, bioluminescent particle drift, no visible floor or surface. [5s-9s] Single light source appears, reveals textured sediment layer below. [9s-10s] Cut to black.
